name: 24" x 18" Landscape Study Framed Wall Canvas Antique Gold - Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee: Serene Decor for Home Office
description: Evoke a sense of serenity with this 24" x 18" Landscape Study Framed Wall Canvas Antique Gold by Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee to your wall decor. This beautiful painting features earthy tones and is set in an antique gold frame, making it a perfect addition to any room. Whether you hang the landscape framed wall canvas by Threshold™ designed with Studio McGee in your bedroom, living room or office, you’re sure to enjoy the peaceful scenery it brings every time you look at it.
